data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for routing rules to queue/review/checkout based on lead quality or service type. However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations regarding the implementation of these routing rules. The linked use case mentions routing leads but does not provide concrete evidence of the routing rules being applied, indicating a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of routing rules based on lead quality or service type.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add routing rules validation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that routing rules are applied based on lead quality or service type.
